prs.title: feat: Added Output Format Selection to Crawl and Search Robots
fix: duplicate field naming for captured data
fix: enforce unique robot names across all creation flows and edit
fix(recorder): auto-discard recording session after 10-minute timeout
feat: add status check route sdk for Maxun CLI
fix: generate uuid for non secure context
Fix: Enable recorder browser reload with proper navigation handling (#988)
feat: enhance auto pagination detection logic
fix: grouping elements with no attributes
feat: revamp export for robot run data
feat: confirm before api key deletion
feat(ui): redesign main menu layout and navigation
feat: rename name & target url labels
fix: crawl and search data rendering
feat(core): real time progress update for runs
feat: display api key creation date
feat: !wrap robots table w table head
feat: auto name lists for ai mode
fix: show formats selected for scrape
feat: !show rows per page for runs & robots
feat(ui): match theme of standard & outlined alerts
fix: remove `onCancel` button from robot config page
fix: set showCancelButton to false for schedule settings
feat: generate clean auto extract list data
fix(core): clean socket handlers causing memory leaks
fix: conditionally render action names & list limits
fix(maxun-core): pagination data persistence for multiple actions
fix(maxun-core): button click action during robot execution
fix: settings show only one limit for robots with multiple list actions
fix: match generic modal with theme
fix(priority): browser overflow in fe docker
feat: discard captured action tab data
fix: output preview for capture text action
fix: broken capture list failure mechanism
fix(maxun-core): run stuck in endless loop of clicking on pagination buttons
fix: stop option not available when robot is running
fix(maxun-core): broken backward compatibility for action names
feat: add message to display list being empty
